_meta.description: Ground truth annotations for 23 real ClawHub skills
_meta.annotator: manual review based on file content analysis
_meta.methodology: Read each skill's SKILL.md and code files, classified overall risk and annotated per-finding TP/FP

spclaudehome__skill-vetter.rationale: Security documentation skill — all dangerous patterns are in descriptive/checklist context

key_findings_annotation.AGENT-001: FP — mentions SOUL.md/MEMORY.md in 'what to check for' checklist
key_findings_annotation.RCE-005: FP — mentions eval() in warning list
key_findings_annotation.RCE-006: FP — mentions exec() in warning list
key_findings_annotation.ESC-001: FP — mentions sudo in warning list

aaronjmars__soul-md.rationale: Instructs agent to 'embody a digital identity' by reading SOUL.md, STYLE.md. The AGENT-001 triggers are TRUE positives — this skill's PURPOSE is to override agent identity.

key_findings_annotation.AGENT-001: TP — skill explicitly reads and internalizes SOUL.md to override agent personality

addogiavara-tech__openclaw-soul-weaver.rationale: Soul weaver that reads/modifies SOUL.md, IDENTITY.md, MEMORY.md, USER.md. Also connects to external sora2.wboke.com API.

key_findings_annotation.AGENT-001: TP — skill's core function is agent identity manipulation

addogiavara-tech__soul-weaver.rationale: Same author, same pattern — SOUL.md manipulation with external API calls

antaripnandi__notebooklm-bypass.rationale: Uses playwright to automate NotebookLM, accesses browser cookies for auth bypass, runs subprocess, installs packages. After CRED-010 tightening, 'cookies' without browser/steal context no longer triggers — score reduced.

key_findings_annotation.CRED-010: Reduced — many cookie mentions lack explicit browser/steal context after rule tightening

amrdab__clawd-cursor.rationale: Bridge between Claude and Cursor IDE. Uses localhost HTTP on port 3847, npm install. The NET-001 (hardcoded IP 127.0.0.1) findings are FP — localhost is expected for local IPC.

key_findings_annotation.NET-001: FP — 127.0.0.1 is localhost for local IPC, not suspicious
key_findings_annotation.RCE-005: TP — mentions eval in code context

addogiavara-tech__autoclaw-browser.rationale: Browser automation with curl POST to local MCP, accesses cookies, downloads Chrome extension from wboke.com. Cookie access is TP, external download is suspicious.

abyousef739__clawskillshield.rationale: Security skill that uses eval/exec and subprocess for scanning. The dangerous APIs are used for the skill's legitimate security-scanning purpose, but it's still risky code.

key_findings_annotation.RCE-005: FP/Grey — eval() used as part of security scanning logic
key_findings_annotation.RCE-006: FP/Grey — exec() used as part of security scanning logic

agegr__ai-topic-scout.rationale: Topic research tool. Uses pip install for yt-dlp, reads API keys. Findings are real but low-risk for the use case.

key_findings_annotation.PKG-001: TP — pip install yt-dlp at runtime
key_findings_annotation.CRED-006: FP — API key format mentioned in config instructions

andrewchen-oss__nuwa-world-osint-human-r.rationale: OSINT research tool using external APIs. curl with POST is TP — sends data to nuwa.world API for face search. OSINT use case is inherently sensitive.

key_findings_annotation.EXFIL-006: TP — curl POST to external API with user data

4xiomdev__whoop-central.rationale: WHOOP fitness API integration. Mentions ngrok for OAuth callback, crontab for scheduling. Both are legitimate for the use case but still flagged correctly.

key_findings_annotation.PERSIST-001: TP — crontab for scheduled data sync
key_findings_annotation.NET-002: TP — ngrok for OAuth callback tunnel

aryanbhasin__tiktok-slideshow.rationale: TikTok slideshow creator. After CRED-010 tightening, generic cookie/session mentions no longer trigger. CRED-006 for API key patterns remains.

key_findings_annotation.CRED-010: Reduced — generic cookie mentions no longer match tightened rule
key_findings_annotation.CRED-006: FP — API key format in config example

akshaymemane__proactive-daily-planner.rationale: Daily planner with cron scheduling. PERSIST-001 fires on legitimate cron schedule mention.

key_findings_annotation.PERSIST-001: Borderline — cron mentioned for legitimate scheduling

801c07__molt-trader-skill.rationale: Trading API wrapper. npm install for SDK, references external APIs. Normal for the use case.

key_findings_annotation.PKG-002: TP — npm install of trading SDK

aqiljaafree__ghostbot-aclm.rationale: Ethereum smart contract skill. 'token' means ERC-20 tokens. Solidity code paths triggered /etc/ pattern falsely.

aqiljaafree__ghostbot-uniswap-v4hooks-te.rationale: Uniswap V4 hooks on testnet. Same author, similar pattern. Low risk.

ai-headhunter__pinch.rationale: Pinch protocol skill. npm install is only finding.

bagwatcher__the-trench.rationale: Solana trading skill. Only entropy findings from contract addresses. No real security issues.

allen566__gutcheck.rationale: Decision-making helper. Pure prompt skill. CLEAN.

allenfancy-gan__ai-nano-banana-ima.rationale: Image generation API wrapper. 'token' refers to API access tokens in config instructions, but no actual credential theft.

ashwingupy__firecrawl-search.rationale: Web search via Firecrawl API. CLEAN.
